summary: Grom HQ Activity Monitoring & Spending Controls testing complete. All backend APIs pass (13/13 tests). Frontend UI verified: Grom HQ displays linked Groms, GromManage page shows Activity/Spending/Controls tabs with all features working. Fixed SQLAlchemy JSON field mutation issue for parental_controls persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed SQLAlchemy JSON field mutation detection issue in /app/backend/routes/grom_hq.py - added flag_modified() for parental_controls updates
Backend endpoints correctly verify parent authorization before returning Grom data
Frontend GromManage.js correctly fetches activity and spending data on mount
All parental controls (can_post, can_stream, can_message, can_comment, view_only) persist correctly after fix
Spending limits (monthly_limit, require_approval_above) persist correctly after fix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Grom HQ and GromManage features verified: (1) Backend endpoints /api/grom-hq/linked-groms, /api/grom-hq/activity, /api/grom-hq/spending-summary, /api/grom-hq/spending-controls, /api/grom-hq/update-parental-controls all working. (2) Fixed JSON field mutation issue with flag_modified(). (3) Frontend GromHQ.js shows linked Groms with stats. (4) Frontend GromManage.js has Activity/Spending/Controls tabs. (5) Navigation between Grom HQ and GromManage works via chevron click and back link.

features_verified.grom_hq_displays_linked_groms: VERIFIED - Shows Little Wave Rider with Grom badge, $0, 0 badges
features_verified.grom_hq_stats: VERIFIED - Shows 1 Linked Grom, $0 Total Earnings, 0 Sessions, 0 Achievements
features_verified.activity_tab_stats: VERIFIED - Shows Total Posts, Posts This Week, Sessions Joined, Credits Balance
features_verified.activity_tab_transactions: VERIFIED - Shows Recent Activity section with empty state
features_verified.spending_tab_monthly: VERIFIED - Shows $0 Spent This Month with limit progress bar
features_verified.spending_tab_category: VERIFIED - Shows Spending by Category with empty state
features_verified.spending_tab_limits: VERIFIED - Monthly Spending Limit and Require Approval Above inputs work
features_verified.save_spending_limits: VERIFIED - Save button works, shows success toast, data persists
features_verified.controls_tab_permissions: VERIFIED - Shows Can Post, Can Go Live, Can Message, Can Comment, View Only Mode toggles
features_verified.save_controls: VERIFIED - Save button works, shows success toast, data persists
features_verified.back_to_grom_hq: VERIFIED - Back link navigates correctly to /grom-hq

bug_fix_applied.issue: Parental controls and spending limits not persisting after update
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: SQLAlchemy JSON field mutation detection - modifying dict in-place not detected
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added flag_modified(grom, 'parental_controls') after updating JSON field in both update-parental-controls and spending-controls endpoints
